---
title: "Huan Minh Tran, MD, PhD"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: assets/profile.jpg          # TODO: add a photo named profile.jpg in assets/
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:huan.tran@ubc.ca"
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/huantranUBC          # TODO
    - text: "ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-6415-8021
    - text: "Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=OsfxbQsAAAAJ&hl=en
---

::: {.typed-tagline}
<span id="typed-target" data-strings="Respiratory epidemiologist|Climate &amp; air pollution researcher|Environmental health scientist|Biostatistician in R"></span>
:::

Postdoctoral Researcher, Division of Respiratory Medicine, Faculty of Medicine,
University of British Columbia.

My research studies how air pollution, extreme temperature, and climate
variability affect chronic respiratory disease — particularly **COPD** — from
individual lung-function decline to country-level mortality. I work with clinical
cohorts, administrative health data, and global ecological analyses.

## Research interests

- Air pollution, climate, and chronic respiratory disease
- Extreme temperature and humidity effects on COPD
- Eosinophilic COPD and susceptibility to particulate air pollution
- Country-level analyses of climate-related respiratory mortality
- Occupational and environmental exposure
- Biostatistics in R and Quarto

## Contact

Division of Respiratory Medicine, University of British Columbia\
2635 Laurel Street, Vancouver, BC V5Z 1M9, Canada\
[huan.tran@ubc.ca](mailto:huan.tran@ubc.ca) · +1 236 996 8791
